evals.prompt: What are the two transcription paths and when do you use each?

expectations: Mentions auto-subs as default fast path
Mentions whisper-cpp with --whisper flag for higher quality
Mentions auto-subs has typos on proper nouns

evals.prompt: What output files does the script write?
